docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIU, ZHIQIANG AS TO DEFENDANT MERRITT, EDDIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF, HOWEVER REQUESTED COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
